who: Accounting firm executives managing 10-20 client engagements
offer: For accounting firm executives processing 10-20 client engagements, compliance oversight causes increased risk of penalties. We provide a compliance dashboard instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets and emails.
problem: Inability to effectively monitor compliance and risk across multiple client engagements.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting help
Indie Hackers discussions on compliance tools
DM outreach to accounting executives with demo links
Engage in community forums discussing compliance solutions
try_it: Let users try real-time compliance tracking on 1-3 clients
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with CTA
Produce a demo video of the dashboard
Offer early access to first 10 sign-ups
Share weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow users to save common compliance settings
Provide preset reminder schedules for tasks
Enable CSV import for existing client data
Streamline onboarding process with fewer steps
